race.comment: The well-related SHE'S A BEAUTY (6) (half to 2xG2 winner and 3xG1 placed Barb Raider) has put back-to-back wins together and is racing high on confidence of late. Hard to knock mares in form and should be right there at the business end again. SHE'S SPEEDY (11) also hails from a handy family (half to G3 winner Rich Fortune) and maps ideally for this from gate three. Sure to be competitive. FONEELEVEN (10) is a consistent conveyance who has only missed a drum once in five career outings and will strip fitter second-up from the spell. In the mix. RAMIUS (1) is the only runner to get some weight off with the claim. Exotics candidate.
